title: stillingia texana var. typica
intro: Stillingia texana var. typica, also known as Indian poke or poke root, is a plant species native to the southeastern United States, belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Stillingia texana var. typica include reducing inflammation, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the root of the plant is typically dried and used to make teas, tinctures, or capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
